Pull Request

Source: .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md

Summary

Brief description of what this PR changes and why.

Related Issue(s)

Closes #[issue number] Related to #[issue number]

Type of Change

Changes Made

Detailed description of the changes: - [Change 1] - [Change 2] - [Etc.]

Testing

How have you tested these changes? Include: - [ ] Local testing completed - [ ] Test cases added/updated - [ ] All tests passing (make test) - [ ] Manual testing steps: 1. [Step 1] 2. [Step 2]

Documentation

Architecture/Design Notes

If this is a significant change, explain: - What problem does this solve? - How does it fit with existing architecture? - Were there alternative approaches considered? - Any potential impacts on other components?

Checklist

Additional Context

Any additional information reviewers should know: - Specific areas that need close review - Known limitations or future work - Dependency updates and their rationale

On this page
